description_long: This is a compact, single-story house with a gable roof and a modest footprint, set on a rectangular plot of land. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a small overhang, flanked by windows and accented with vertical and horizontal trim. The exterior walls are a mix of light-colored siding and darker trim, giving the house a modern yet cozy appearance. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear, while the sides have fewer openings, suggesting a focus on privacy. The roof is dark gray and slightly pitched, typical of residential homes in temperate climates. The house sits on a raised foundation, with steps leading up to the main entrance.
description: A small, single-story house with a gable roof, light siding, and symmetrical windows, featuring a defined entryway and modern trim accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, and symmetrical windows with decorative trim.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal windows and a clear view of the gable roof's slope.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary entrance or large window, with similar trim details as the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mostly solid wall with minimal openings and visible roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with small overhang, steps, and decorative trim
